# Metro Auto Detailing

> Fully mobile auto detailing in Bakersfield, CA. We come to you — home, office, or wherever the vehicle is parked. No drop-off. No shop.

## About

Metro Auto Detailing is a solo mobile operation in Bakersfield, CA. Every job is done by the owner. We bring everything: water, generator, pressure washer, all chemicals and equipment. You don't need to provide anything or be present.

We are not a car wash. A car wash runs a vehicle through a machine and rinses it. A detail uses decontamination products, professional-grade chemicals, and hand processes a machine cannot replicate. The difference is visible in the paint, not just on the surface.

Appointment only. No walk-ins. No fixed location.

## Business

- Name: Metro Auto Detailing
- Phone: (661) 368-5165
- Email: metrodetailing661@gmail.com
- Website: https://metroautodetailing.pro
- Service area: Bakersfield, CA and surrounding areas within 15 miles
- Neighborhoods served: Southwest Bakersfield, Stockdale, Seven Oaks, Terra Vista, Rosedale, Northwest Bakersfield
- Booking: By appointment only
- Equipment: Self-contained. Water tank, generator, pressure washer, all chemicals and tools on-site.

## Services

### Signature Wash — $80 / $100 (larger vehicles)
Hand wash and dry, light wax coat, wheels and rims cleaned, tire dressing, windows cleaned, door jambs cleaned, surface-level interior vacuum and wipe-down. The right call for regular maintenance between deeper services.

### Exterior Detail — $150 / $170
Full exterior decontamination finished with an SiO2 ceramic sealant. Iron remover dissolves bonded metallic contamination. Tar and tree sap removed. Clay bar removes remaining surface contamination and leaves paint smooth to the touch. Koch Chemie S003 applied as ceramic base layer. Stinger 918 SiO2 ceramic sealant sealed on top. 6+ months of protection.

### Interior Detail — $200 / $240
Full interior reset. Thorough vacuum, all panels and surfaces cleaned, carpet and seat shampoo with extraction, windows cleaned inside and out, door jambs cleaned.

### Refresh Detail — $250 / $290
Exterior wash plus a full interior detail in one visit. Hand wash, light wax coat, Stinger 918 ceramic sealant topper, wheels and rims, tire dressing, full interior vacuum, all surfaces cleaned, spot stain treatment on carpet and upholstery, windows inside and out, door jambs.

### Full Detail — $400 / $440
Complete exterior decontamination and full interior reset. Iron remover, acid wash (removes mineral deposits and water spots from paint and glass), tar and sap removal, clay bar, Koch Chemie S003 ceramic base layer, Stinger 918 SiO2 ceramic sealant (6+ months protection). Full interior: thorough vacuum, all surfaces and panels cleaned, carpet and seat shampoo with extraction, CarPro PERL UV interior dressing, windows inside and out, door jambs.

## Add-Ons

- Headlight Restoration: $80 — lenses sanded progressively, polished, prepped with IPA, coated with ceramic clear coat. Restores clarity and protects against UV yellowing.
- Trim Restoration: $100 — Solution Finish applied to faded black plastic trim. Semi-permanent bond to the plastic, not a dressing that washes off. Lasts 9-12+ months.
- Water Spot Removal: $100 — acid wash breaks down mineral deposits etched into paint and glass from hard water exposure.
- Pet Hair and Sand Removal: $80 — full extraction of embedded pet hair and sand from carpet and seats.
- Carpet and Seat Extraction: $70 — deep stain removal, more thorough than spot treatment in a standard detail.
- Engine Bay Detail: $50 — degreased, cleaned, and dressed.
- Leather Conditioning: $40 — leather cleaned, conditioned, and protected against drying and cracking.

## Fleet Pricing

Per linear foot of vehicle length.

- Exterior Wash: $7/ft
- Roof Wash: +$3/ft
- Interior Detail: +$4/ft
- Wash and Wax: $10/ft

## Maintenance Plans

Regular scheduling prevents contamination from building up between services. Pricing reflects condition at time of service.

- Monthly: $110 — hand wash, wheels and rims, tire dressing, windows, door jambs, full interior vacuum and wipe-down.
- Bimonthly (every 2 months): $180 — everything in monthly plus a decontamination wash.
- Quarterly: $225 — everything in monthly plus a decontamination wash.

## Common Questions

**What do I need to provide?**
Nothing. We bring water, generator, all equipment and products.

**Do I need to be home?**
No. Leave the car accessible and keys available.

**What areas do you serve?**
Bakersfield, CA and surrounding areas within 15 miles. Southwest Bakersfield, Stockdale, Seven Oaks, Terra Vista, Rosedale, Northwest Bakersfield, and nearby communities.

**Why do Bakersfield vehicles need decontamination services?**
Bakersfield has some of the worst air quality in the country. Agricultural dust, industrial fallout, and brake dust bond to paint over time. The heat accelerates oxidation. Hard water leaves mineral deposits on paint and glass that a standard wash cannot remove. Iron remover and acid wash break down that contamination. A wash maintains a clean car. A decontamination service removes what a wash leaves behind.

**How long does a detail take?**
Signature Wash: ~1 hour. Full Detail: 4-6+ hours. Time depends on vehicle size and condition.

**What payment methods do you accept?**
All major credit and debit cards, cash, Zelle, Apple Pay.

**Is a deposit required?**
Yes. $20 deposit secures the appointment. Applied toward the total. Refundable with enough notice.
